title: MoBG's HD Texture Pack
description: A unique texture pack with custom visuals for a fresh Minecraft experience
body:
MoBG's Texture Pack is a 512x resource pack that transforms Minecraft into a more immersive and realistic experience.  
This pack removes the classic pixelated style and replaces it with detailed, high-resolution textures that bring a natural look to the game.  

✨ Features:  
- 512x resolution for ultra-detailed visuals  
- Realistic rework of blocks, items, and environments  
- PBR support for shaders (enhanced lighting, reflections, and depth)  
- A fresh and immersive atmosphere while keeping Minecraft’s original spirit  

Perfect for players who want a modern and high-quality Minecraft experience.
